ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the test case (e.g., access to browser, login credentials) */,
  "expected_results" TEXT /* Expected results of the test case */,
  "test_case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Draft, In Progress, Passed, Failed, Rejected) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_steps" (
  "test_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test step */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the test case */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the test step */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test step (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Passed, Failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test step */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test step was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the test step */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test step was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_steps_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "environment_description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the environment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the result belongs to */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the test was executed in */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., New, In Progress, Passed, Failed) */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test result was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the test result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the data belongs to */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the test data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the test data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the test data (e.g., Text, Number, Date) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the test data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test data was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the test data */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
